incidents.title: P-204 drive-end bearing seizure
incidents.text: Pump P-204 stopped after its drive-end bearing seized. Inspection found degraded grease and a missed lubrication interval. Bearing temperature and vibration had risen for three shifts before failure.

incidents.title: C-312 discharge overpressure near-miss
incidents.text: Compressor C-312 discharge pressure rose above the operating limit after a blocked impulse line delayed the trip signal. The relief valve opened and prevented an overpressure event.

incidents.title: V-101 stem seal leak
incidents.text: Valve V-101 leaked process fluid from the stem during maintenance. The packing seal was worn and the gland bolts had uneven torque after reassembly.

incidents.title: M-088 winding overtemperature trip
incidents.text: Motor M-088 tripped on winding overtemperature. Cooling fins were obstructed by dust and the ventilation fan delivered insufficient airflow.

incidents.title: E-055 external corrosion finding
incidents.text: Inspection of vessel E-055 found external corrosion beneath damaged insulation. The inspection interval had been extended and moisture ingress was not detected early.

incidents.title: Repeat P-204 bearing failure
incidents.text: Pump P-204 suffered a second bearing failure. The lubrication route was overdue, grease quantity was below specification, and vibration warnings had not been actioned.

incidents.title: C-312 pressure control excursion
incidents.text: Compressor C-312 experienced another discharge overpressure excursion when its pressure transmitter impulse line became restricted. Operators manually reduced load before relief activation.

incidents.title: V-101 packing leak recurrence
incidents.text: A recurring leak developed around valve V-101 stem packing. Seal compression was uneven and the maintenance torque sequence was not followed.

incidents.title: M-088 cooling fan degradation
incidents.text: Motor M-088 overheated during continuous duty because the cooling fan blades were damaged and airflow across the windings was low.

incidents.title: E-055 corrosion under insulation
incidents.text: Follow-up inspection identified corrosion under insulation on vessel E-055 near a support ring. Water ingress and an overdue coating inspection accelerated metal loss.

incidents.title: P-207 lubrication-related bearing damage
incidents.text: Pump P-207 showed bearing damage, high vibration, and excessive temperature after its automatic lubricator ran empty. The lubrication check was omitted from the weekly route.

incidents.title: C-318 blocked pressure sensing line
incidents.text: Compressor C-318 approached an overpressure condition after condensate blocked the pressure sensing impulse line and delayed the shutdown interlock.

incidents.title: V-104 actuator flange leakage
incidents.text: Valve V-104 developed leakage at the stem seal following actuator work. Packing rings were worn and flange fasteners were tightened out of sequence.

incidents.title: M-092 ventilation blockage
incidents.text: Motor M-092 reached an overheating alarm when debris blocked ventilation openings. Reduced cooling airflow caused elevated winding temperature.

incidents.title: E-061 coating breakdown
incidents.text: Inspection found corrosion and coating breakdown on vessel E-061 beneath wet insulation. A delayed inspection allowed local wall thinning to progress.
